note: Sikora 2011 V. cholerae T2 secretome; chitinase (ChiA1) is an established Eps/T2SS substrate, confirmed in this proteomic secretome. UniProt Q9KQP6=chitinase VC_1952.

Sikora 2011; CtxB co-secreted with CtxA via Eps T2SS. UniProt P01556=CtxB VC_1456.

Sikora 2011 newly identified sialidase (NanH) in secretome as putative T2S substrate, not individually mutant-validated here. UniProt P0C6E9=sialidase VC_1784.
Johnson 2014 (jb.01944-14) shows T2SS delivers biofilm matrix proteins incl RbmC. UniProt Q9KTH2 (VC_0930, hemolysin-related/RbmC).
Sikora 2011 experimentally confirmed VesB as T2S-dependent serine protease (knockout/secretion). UniProt Q9KSQ6=putative trypsin VC_1200.

Sikora 2011; GbpA is an established Eps/T2SS substrate. UniProt Q9KLD5=GbpA VC_A0811.
Sikora 2011; hemagglutinin/protease (HapA, vibriolysin) is a known T2S substrate. UniProt P24153=Hap VC_A0865.
Sikora 2011 detected cytolysin/HlyA in T2 secretome (putative); HlyA T2S-dependence reported elsewhere. UniProt P09545=hemolysin VC_A0219.
Sikora 2011 newly identified VCA0583 hypothetical in secretome as putative T2S substrate. UniProt Q9KM06=solute-binding/uncharacterized VC_A0583.
Sikora 2011 newly identified VCA0738 (annotated TraF) in secretome as putative T2S substrate. UniProt Q9KLK5=TraF VC_A0738.
Sikora 2011 identified leucine aminopeptidase-related VC_A0812 in secretome as putative substrate. UniProt Q9KLD4 matches VC_A0812.
Sikora 2011; lipase is an established V. cholerae T2S substrate. UniProt P15493=triacylglycerol lipase (hlyC/lipA) VC_A0221.
Sikora 2011 identified TagA-related protein in secretome as putative T2S substrate. UniProt Q9KN18=TagA-related VC_A0148.
Sikora 2011 confirmed VesA T2S-dependent; primary protease processing CtxA. UniProt Q9KLE3=putative serine protease VC_A0803.
Filloux 2011 is a REVIEW essay, not primary data. Hxc secretes LMW alkaline phosphatase LapA/PhoA (established elsewhere, Ball 2002). UniProt P35482=LapA/PhoA PA0688.
Filloux 2011 review only; CbpD is an established Xcp T2SS exoprotein but not demonstrated here. UniProt Q9I589=CbpD PA0852.
Filloux 2011 review; LasA staphylolytic protease is a known Xcp substrate, no primary data in this ref. UniProt P14789=LasA PA1871.
Filloux 2011 review; LasB elastase is the canonical Xcp substrate but ref is secondary. UniProt P14756=LasB PA3724.
Filloux 2011 review; lipase (lip/lipA) Xcp-secreted, no primary demonstration in ref. UniProt P26876=lipase PA2862.
Filloux 2011 review; LipC Xcp-secreted, secondary citation. UniProt Q9HUZ7=LipC PA4813.
Filloux 2011 review; PaAP aminopeptidase (lap, PA2939) Xcp-secreted, no primary data here. UniProt Q9HZQ8=PaAP PA2939.
Filloux 2011 review; alkaline phosphatase H (PhoA, PA3296) cited secondarily. UniProt P35483=alkaline phosphatase H PA3296.
UniProt B1V8X4 = Asparagine--tRNA ligase (asnS) of Phytoplasma australiense, NOT PlcB of P. aeruginosa PA0026. Wrong accession. Ref (Filloux 2011) is a review anyway.
Filloux 2011 review; hemolytic PLC-H (plcH PA0844) Xcp/T2SS-associated, secondary citation. UniProt P06200=PLC-H PA0844.
Filloux 2011 review; non-hemolytic PLC-N (plcN PA3319) cited secondarily. UniProt P15713=PLC-N PA3319.
Filloux 2011 review; protease IV (PrpL, PA4175) Xcp-secreted, no primary data in ref. UniProt Q9HWK6=PrpL/lysyl endopeptidase PA4175.

doi_resolves_to: Spatial patterns of bacterial taxa in nature reflect ecological traits of deep branches of the 16S rRNA bacterial tree (Philippot 2009, Environ Microbiol)
note: DOI 10.1111/j.1462-2920.2009.02014.x resolves to an unrelated 16S/ecology paper. CelA (lpg1918 cellulase) is a genuine Lsp T2SS substrate (Cianciotto/DebRoy 2006 PNAS) but the cited DOI is wrong. UniProt Q5ZU89=cellulase lpg1918.

doi_resolves_to: Spatial patterns of bacterial taxa in nature reflect ecological traits of deep branches of the 16S rRNA bacterial tree (Philippot 2009, Environ Microbiol)
note: Same wrong DOI. LapA aminopeptidase (lpg2634) is a real T2S substrate (Rossier/Cianciotto) but DOI points to an ecology paper. UniProt Q5ZS85=leucine aminopeptidase lpg2634.
Tyson 2013 (iai.00045-13) confirmed NttA as a novel Lsp T2S substrate (mutated, host-dependent role). UniProt Q5ZVQ5=T2SS substrate NttA lpg1385.
Tyson 2013 confirmed NttB as novel T2S substrate. UniProt Q5ZWV7 (lpg0978, uncharacterized=NttB).
Portlock 2020 (fmolb.2020.00112) confirmed NttE as Lsp T2S substrate, solved structure, infection phenotype. UniProt Q5ZZ22 (lpg0189=NttE).

doi_resolves_to: Spatial patterns of bacterial taxa in nature reflect ecological traits of deep branches of the 16S rRNA bacterial tree (Philippot 2009, Environ Microbiol)
note: Same wrong DOI. PlaA lysophospholipase A (lpg0926) is a genuine Lsp T2S substrate (Flieger/Cianciotto) but cited DOI is an unrelated ecology paper. UniProt Q5ZX07=uncharacterized lpg0926.

Sole 2015 (jb.00322-15) confirms a lipase (XCV0536, prior virulence factor) is Xps-T2S secreted via mutant assays, but secretion was also partly OMV-mediated/not fully T2S-abolished. UniProt Q3BY96 is a DELETED entry (removed from reference proteome); locus XCV0536 historically correct.
Letellier 1997 (jbc.272.17.11109) studies proaerolysin secretion energetics across the OM via the Exe T2SS. UniProt P09167=aerolysin AerA A. hydrophila.

Li 2011 (JB.00882-10) is about ExeA peptidoglycan binding/secretin assembly, not a direct lip secretion assay; lip is an Exe substrate but this ref characterizes the machinery, not this substrate. UniProt P40600=extracellular lipase A. hydrophila.

Shutinoski 2010 (j.1365-2958.2009.06998.x) identified ChiY (YE3576) as a Yts1 T2S secretion substrate. Note locus_tag YE3650 in row is the ye3650 substrate, not chiY (YE3576); gene/locus label mismatch. UniProt A1JQR7 is a DELETED entry; locus YE3650 historically valid.
Shutinoski 2010 identified EngY (YE2830) as a Yts1 T2S secretion substrate. UniProt A1JU21 is a DELETED entry; locus YE2830 historically correct for engY.
Shutinoski 2010 identified YE3650 as one of three Yts1 T2S secretion substrates (with ChiY, EngY). UniProt A1JQR7 is a DELETED entry; locus YE3650 historically correct.
Cadoret 2014 (JB.01563-14) shows Txc T2SS specifically secretes CbpE chitin-binding protein in PA7. UniProt A6V5Q1 is a DELETED entry; locus PSPA7_3026 for cbpE.
DuMont 2015 (IAI.00672-15) shows StmPr1 serine protease is T2S-dependent in S. maltophilia. UniProt Q93IQ4=alkaline serine protease StmPr1 (Smlt0861).

doi_resolves_to: An extracellular zinc metalloprotease gene of Burkholderia cepacia (Corbett 2003, Microbiology)
note: Corbett 2003 (mic.0.26243-0) characterizes the zmpA metalloprotease gene/secretion but predates and is in B. cepacia, not a J2315 T2S-mutant secretome; T2SS-dependence not directly shown here. UniProt Q7WSN3=ZmpA neutral metalloproteinase B. cepacia (organism Burkholderia cepacia, not explicitly cenocepacia J2315).

Kazemi-Pour 2004 (pmic.200300814) is the E. chrysanthemi/D. dadantii secretome proteomic survey; PaeY pectin acetylesterase detected as Out/T2S substrate (proteomic, not individual mutant). UniProt E0SAZ4=pectin acetylesterase paeY Dda3937_03373.
Kazemi-Pour 2004 secretome; PelA detected as Out substrate by proteomics. UniProt P0C1A3=pectate lyase A Dda3937_03370.

Shevchik 1997 (emboj/16.11.3007) shows specific interaction of OutD secretin with secreted Pel proteins incl PelB; PelB is an established Out/T2S substrate. UniProt E0SJQ6=pectate lyase B Dda3937_04193.
Lindeberg 1998 (JB.180.6.1431) studies PelC C-terminal loops required for Out-pathway secretion; direct T2S secretion evidence. UniProt E0SJQ7=pectate lyase C Dda3937_04192.
Kazemi-Pour 2004 secretome; PelD detected as Out substrate by proteomics. UniProt E0SAZ3=pectate lyase D Dda3937_03372.
He 1991 (jb.173.14.4310) shows PelE extracellular secretion via the out pathway is Sec-dependent at inner membrane then Out across OM. UniProt P0C1A5=pectate lyase E Dda3937_03371.

Shevchik 1997 (jb.179.23.7321) characterizes PelI as a new pectate lyase family member secreted by E. chrysanthemi; Out-dependence is the broader system, this ref is enzyme characterization. UniProt E0SM75=pectate lyase PelI Dda3937_00058.

doi_resolves_to: PelN Is a New Pectate Lyase of Dickeya dadantii with Unusual Characteristics (Hassan 2013, J Bacteriol)
note: DOI 10.1128/JB.02118-12 is about PelN, NOT PelL. Wrong protein. PelL is a real Out substrate but the cited paper characterizes PelN. UniProt P0C1A7=pectate lyase L (Pel9A) Dda3937_02794 is correct.
Kazemi-Pour 2004 secretome; PemA pectin methylesterase detected as Out substrate by proteomics. UniProt P0C1A9=pectinesterase A pemA Dda3937_03374.
